title: sonchus × rupicola
intro: Sonchus × rupicola, also known as prickly sow thistle, is a hybrid plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is commonly found in rocky and disturbed areas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Sonchus × rupicola include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Sonchus × rupicola is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be consumed fresh or dried to utilize its medicinal properties.
